description: This lesson will ONLY be assigned to student enrolled in the selected class and course under their current lesson period
searchPlaceholder: Search student by typing email, name or phone

dialog.titleDeleteDialog: Do you want to delete lesson

postpone.postpone: You have selected to postpone this lesson!
postpone.postponeWarning: A new lesson will be added one week after the current end of the period. Once you proceed, you will not be able to change the status of this attendance record.

changeEntireLesson.changeEntireLessonDescription: All students in the current lesson will be re-assigned to the new time slot. The new time slot will belong to the same course and class.
changeEntireLesson.tooltip: Lessons in the past cannot be changed

delayFollowingLessons.title: Delay All Following Lessons
delayFollowingLessons.description: The current lesson will be canceled, and an extra lesson will be assigned to all students in the current lesson in next available slot.
delayFollowingLessons.featureForRecurring: This feature is only applicable to recurring classes
delayFollowingLessons.delayFollowingLessonsSuccess: Save data delay all following lessons successfully
